# Alex Myers - The Armchair Futurist

## About
Certified futurist and AI strategy advisor helping leaders navigate AI adoption, close the accountability gap, and reclaim 10-20 hours per week through human-first execution.

## Services
- Digital Identity Landing Page ($199)
- Custom AI Provisioning ($1,000-$5,000)
- AI Mentoring & Mindset Coaching ($97+)
- Managed Agent Operations ($500-$2,000/month)
- Psychology-Led Adoption Strategy ($10,625)
- AI Infusion Lab ($38,250-$55,250)

## Expertise
AI Strategy & Adoption, Change Management, Future of Work, Digital Transformation, Organizational Design

## Certifications
- Certified Futurist & Long-Term Analyst (FLTA)
- Certified Change Management Professional (CCMP)
- GenAI Academy Expert
- Certified Enterprise Blockchain Professional (CEBP)
- Professional Scrum Master (PSM)
- Professional Agile Leadership (PAL)

## Featured In
Techstars, NTT Data, GenAI Academy, Aragon.org
